title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on global cooperation and individual energy use.

questions.question: Can countries ever truly agree on global climate targets?
How much should individuals change their lifestyle to save energy?

script.text: Can countries ever truly agree on global climate targets?
How much should individuals change their lifestyle to save energy?
Is it realistic to expect the world to stop using fossil fuels completely?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
